allow: Bash(cmd.exe /c "wmic process where ProcessId=10412 get Name,ProcessId,CommandLine 2>&1")
Bash(cmd.exe /c "taskkill /F /IM electron.exe 2>&1 & taskkill /F /IM python.exe 2>&1 & taskkill /F /IM python3.exe 2>&1")
Bash(cmd.exe /c "for /f \\"tokens=5\\" %a in \('netstat -aon ^| findstr :8932 ^| findstr LISTENING'\) do taskkill /F /PID %a" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8932 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id \\$_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Get-Process -Name electron -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force")
